title: Qwen3.5-0.8B GGUF full-attention GPU prelude and paged KV append

change.summary: The resident GGUF full-attention path no longer copies Q/K/V to host for q/k RMSNorm, RoPE, attention history, softmax, or gate application.
implemented: GGUF F32-weight Qwen3.5 head RMSNorm + position-indexed partial RoPE kernel
GPU BF16 q/gate split and BF16->FP32 K conversion
span-shaped paged K/V append through KVLiveSpans
paged full-attention decode over BF16 KV cache
BF16 gate application before the GGUF attention output projection
caveats: This is a one-token resident decode/prompt-serial path, not rows>1 prefill.
AOTriton V3 full-attention prefill remains follow-up work.
Timing is diagnostic only and is not promoted as a throughput row.

layer_oracle.fixture: first Qwen3.5 GGUF full-attention layer (layer 3), prompt tokens [760, 4087]

checks.hidden_allclose: rtol <= 2.5e-2, atol <= 3.0e-2 vs old CPU bridge
checks.lm_head_top1: GPU prelude top-1 equals CPU bridge top-1

e2e_gate.command: hipcc --version > /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt && /usr/bin/time -f 'elapsed=%E exit=%x' env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_e2e_correctness.py --repeat 2 --max-new-tokens 4 --json /tmp/gguf_task45_e2e_r2.json

rocprof_kernel_trace.command: env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-file gguf_task45 --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task45-rocprof.OoG279 -- python3 /tmp/profile_gguf_task45_generate.py
rocprof_kernel_trace.production_host_bridge_grep: No matches for _host_full_attention, _copy_bf16_device_to_f32, full_k_history, full_v_history, or context_bits in hipengine/runtime/qwen35_gguf_runner.py

diagnostic_timing.command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'PY' ... Qwen35GGUFResidentSession fixture timing ... PY

validation.targeted_tests_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_ops.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_llm_gguf_generate_path.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_tokenizer.py tests/test_gguf_e2e_acceptance.py tests/test_llm_generate.py tests/test_model_quant_and_imports.py -q
